title: Being charge for workforms and no way to cancel it in our billing dashboard
excerpt: Our understanding is that work forms is included with work management. We keep getting billed for it and there isn’t a way to cancel it in our billing dashboard as our billing dashboard only shows Work Management, Dev, a…

posts.author: nice (Lulu)
posts.cookedHtml: Our understanding is that work forms is included with work management. We keep getting billed for it and there isn’t a way to cancel it in our billing dashboard as our billing dashboard only shows Work Management, Dev, and CRM. This is going on a year of being billed for work forms. Who can we speak to so we can remedy this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you tried contacting support through your account?
